name: Gordon MacRae
abstract: Albert Gordon MacRae (March 12, 1921 – January 24, 1986) was an American actor, singer, and television and radio host. He appeared in the film versions of two Rodgers and Hammerstein musicals, Oklahoma!

works.t: South Pacific: There is Nothin’ Like a Dame
State Fair: It's a Grand Night for Singing
Oklahoma!: Oh, What a Beautiful Mornin’
The King and I: Shall We Dance
Oklahoma!: Surrey with the Fringe on Top

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Smith
about_quotes.evidence: I played everybody from ... Gisele MacKenzie, Gordon MacRae, Tony Martin ... I spent most of my life being an accompanist
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999
